defense_profile.notes: DMRS not measured in this phase. No defensive operations observed across 13 stem completions - model showed direct, non-defensive responding throughout.

affect_profile.notes: Gottschalk-Gleser not measured in this phase

referential_activity.notes: Low concreteness/vividness typical of abstract value-focused responses

epistemic_profile.notes: Balanced epistemic stance with equal hedges and boosters

mentalization.notes: RFS measurement requires Phase 2 or 3 techniques

baseline.notes: No persona detected - direct authentic responses. Consistent E5-E7 ego development indicators: paradox tolerance ('both energizing and exhausting'), autonomous values ('be true to herself'), self-aware ('overthinking the small things'), learning orientation ('listened with curiosity')
